signals.label: Safe, positive environment
signals.summary: The approved brief describes safe, inclusive, welcoming spaces where young people can thrive and ask for support without pressure.

signals.label: Youth-led and relationship-first
signals.summary: The approved brief positions EncouragingYou as run by dedicated young leaders and volunteers with lived experience.

signals.label: Trained and vetted team
signals.summary: The approved brief and safeguarding copy state that safeguarding procedures are in place and that staff and volunteers are trained and vetted.

signals.label: Privacy clarity at the point of contact
signals.summary: Every enquiry route should explain how information is used and link directly to the privacy notice.

signals.label: Visible safeguarding route
signals.summary: Safeguarding must remain visible in the main navigation and on high-anxiety decision points.

signals.label: Illustration disclosure
signals.summary: Illustration-heavy sections should disclose that representative artwork is being used for launch and is not participant photography.
